title: dryopteris rotundata var. tijuccana
intro: Dryopteris rotundata var. tijuccana, also known as Tijuccana fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris rotundata var. tijuccana include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its extracts have also been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
